intervention: Add an edge-aware image-gradient consistency term: L = L_rgb + lambda_edge * L1(Sobel(render), Sobel(gt))
baseline_measure: Worst-4 held-out views: mean SSIM 0.6917, mean LPIPS 0.2971
expected_change: +0.03 mean SSIM on worst-4 views and -0.02 mean LPIPS on worst-4 views
falsification_condition: Hypothesis fails if worst-4 SSIM improves by <0.03 or worst-4 LPIPS decreases by <0.02
secondary_guardrail: Average PSNR must not drop by more than 0.2 dB; training time overhead <=10%

intervention: Replace multinomial opacity resampling with lower-variance systematic opacity resampling and run train with cap_max reduced by 20%
baseline_measure: Baseline cap_max 1,100,000; training time about 40m10s; PSNR 22.2575 / SSIM 0.8251 / LPIPS 0.2010
expected_change: At least 15% wall-clock training-time reduction while keeping metrics close to baseline
falsification_condition: Hypothesis fails if training time reduction <15% or PSNR drops by >0.3 dB or SSIM drops by >0.01
secondary_guardrail: LPIPS must not increase by more than 0.02; final result must still remain within assignment reproduction tolerance
